---
species: "Cyclopterus lumpus"
accepted_code: "CYLU"
alternate_codes: ""
diminutive: ""
alternate_diminutives: ""
common_name: "Lumpfish"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Stout, round fish with bumpy appearance and modified suction-cup pelvic fins"
image: '/header_images/cyclopterus_lumpus.jpg'
image_credit: 'Photo from Heinz Wiele via [WORMS](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=image&pic=40172&tid=127214)'
categories:
  - fish
sampling_programs:
    - keen_swath
    - lsw_videos
habitat:
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
catami_code: ""
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: "127214"
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
